content.full_text:
December 20, 2000

Marsha Jones Moutrie, City Attorney
Office of the City Attorney
City Hall
1685 Main Street
Post Office Box 2200
Santa Monica, California 90407-2200

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 00-272

Dear Ms. Moutrie:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict of interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 The Act requires the Commission to provide written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person's authorized representative. (Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(b)(1), enclosed.) However, the Commission does not provide advice where the requestor is seeking advice about another person's duties under the Act and has not been authorized to do so by that person. (Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(b)(8)(B).) Since your request relates to Christopher Joseph and you are not the authorized representative of that individual, we are unable to provide you with advice.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Natalie Bocanegra
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

NB:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\00272.doc

1 Government Code sections 81000 - 91015. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109 - 18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
